title: T-026 — Inspection lifecycle Server Actions (assign/start/complete/cancel)
prompt:
# T-026 — Inspection lifecycle Server Actions

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §7.1 EPIC 8C, §11.2 V-QA-INSP-001..009, §8.2 QA-031
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions: createInspection, assignInspection, startInspection, completeInspection, cancelInspection. Enforces V-QA-INSP-001 (active spec at start), V-QA-INSP-007 (inspector role), V-QA-INSP-006 (fail_reason on fail), V-QA-INSP-005 (critical params all pass).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/server/quality/inspections.ts` exports the 5 Server Actions with Zod validation.
2. State transitions enforced server-side: pending → assigned → in_progress → completed | cancelled.
3. completeInspection auto-computes top-level result from quality_test_results aggregation per V-QA-INSP-004 (fail if any critical fail; conditional if non-critical fail; pass if all pass).
4. cancelInspection requires cancel_reason; only allowed from pending|assigned|in_progress.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/inspections.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/inspections.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a pending inspection bound to spec v_active, when assignInspection(inspector_id) runs and inspector role is qa_inspector, then status='assigned' and assigned_to_user_id is set
2. Given an in_progress inspection where 1 critical parameter result='fail', when completeInspection runs, then top-level result='fail' (server overrides any client-passed result per V-QA-INSP-004)
3. Given a completed inspection, when cancelInspection runs, then it rejects with INVALID_STATE and writes nothing
4. Given completeInspection with result='fail' and no fail_reason_code_id and no fail_reason_notes, then it rejects with V-QA-INSP-006 and writes nothing

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions for inspection lifecycle (create/assign/start/complete/cancel) with V-QA-INSP server-authoritative result computation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Zod-validated Server Actions enforce state machine and V-QA-INSP rules. completeInspection re-aggregates quality_test_results to compute top-level result (V-QA-INSP-004 server authoritative). cancelInspection requires cancel_reason. RBAC checks per §2.3. Audit trigger on quality_inspections appends rows (T-040).
acceptance_criteria: Given a pending inspection bound to an active spec, when assignInspection(inspector_id) runs and inspector role is qa_inspector, then status='assigned' and assigned_to_user_id is set
Given an in_progress inspection where 1 critical parameter result='fail', when completeInspection runs, then top-level result='fail' (server overrides any client-passed result per V-QA-INSP-004)
Given a completed inspection, when cancelInspection runs, then it rejects with INVALID_STATE and writes nothing
Given completeInspection with result='fail' and neither fail_reason_code_id nor fail_reason_notes, then it rejects with V-QA-INSP-006 and writes nothing
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/__tests__/inspections.test.ts asserting state transitions, server-authoritative result, fail_reason requirement
risk_red_lines: Do not trust client-passed top-level result (V-QA-INSP-004 server-authoritative)
Do not allow cancel from completed status
Do not skip RBAC enforcement on assign/start/complete
